---
title: Hierarchical Data and Batch Processing
description: >
  Persephone provides certain features to process complex timeseries
  with or without a hierarchical structure. This article aims to give
  some syntax examples and showcase how batches of timeseries can
  be processed.
---

Persephone provides certain features to process complex timeseries
with or without a hierarchical structure. This article aims to give
some syntax examples and showcase how batches of timeseries can
be processed.

## TODO

Something similar to the [hierarchicalEU article](https://statistikat.github.io/persephone/articles/persephone-hierarchicalEU.html).
